title: Use the rust log API instead of print/eprint
note: Replace print/eprint with Rust log crate. Straightforward code cleanup.

title: Support Figma OAuth 2.0 Token Authentication in Addition to Personal Access Tokens
note: Add OAuth 2.0 support alongside PAT. Well-described feature request with Figma API docs linked.

title: "Wrap" feature of auto layout not supported
note: Figma Auto Layout "Wrap" not supported in DC. Feature gap - need to add flex-wrap to layout engine.

title: Component get Stuck in Prototype Interaction State
note: Button with 3 variant properties gets stuck in pressed state after interaction. Relates to prototype state machine handling.

title: NPE when creating 2 components from single Figma node
note: NPE when 2 @DesignComponent annotations reference same Figma node. Clear repro steps with code sample.

title: Autolayout "fill" sometimes overflows its container
note: Auto Layout fill child overflows when switching between parent frames. Timing/state issue in layout recalculation.

title: Component Instances are not render correctly until detached
note: Rare rendering issue with component instances - inconsistent positioning. Hard to reproduce ("rare cases").
more_details: Need specific Figma file and exact repro steps for the "rare" case

title: Autolayout Spacing Option "Auto" is not distributing the Items correctly
note: Auto Layout spacing "Auto" (space-between) not distributing items correctly, items pushed out of container.

title: Layers with opacity start flickering when placed on another layer with opacity
note: Opacity flickering when layered elements both have layer opacity. Rendering compositing issue.

title: Variables with included Opacity are not rendered properly
note: Figma variables with opacity (e.g. rgba) render at 100% opacity. Alpha channel lost during variable resolution.

title: Why System.err.println("childComposable is ...")?
note: Debug println left in production code (SquooshTreeBuilder.kt:434). Simple cleanup - remove or convert to proper logging.

title: ListContent/ListContentData Index is not correct.
note: ListContent click index is wrong - clicking item shows wrong index. Off-by-one or pagination issue in list handling.

title: Serialization errors caused by presence of various Figma features
note: Serialization fails when Figma file contains layout guides, Dev Mode, or certain features. Need graceful handling/skip.

title: Instance Swap Resets to Default When Changing Variant via Code
note: Instance swap resets to default when variant is changed via code. State management issue in component overrides.

title: Component Collapses When Switching Variants via Code
note: Component collapses (0 size) when switching variant via code. Layout recalculation fails on variant change.

title: Line Height Mismatch Between Figma and Emulator Rendering
note: Line height 100% in Figma renders differently on emulator. Text measurement mismatch between Figma and Compose.

title: Incorrect Variant State Triggering in Figma Prototypes with Multiple Properties
note: With multiple variant properties, prototype always triggers first pressed state regardless of which variant. State machine bug.

title: Modifier customization gone?
note: Modifier customization (e.g. clickable) stopped working after Squoosh migration. Regression from v0.32 to v0.37.

title: Allow auto pause and resume functionality for LiveUpdate.
note: LiveUpdate polls every 5s causing Figma rate limit errors. Request auto-pause/resume mechanism.

title: The Design Switcher fails to show no connectivity in battleship app
note: Design Switcher doesnt show offline state in battleship app (no internet permission). Empty screen instead of error.

title: Update MediaCompose documentation to refer to the .fig files checked in
note: Update MediaCompose docs to reference .fig files checked into repo. Documentation update.

title: add render test for flex direction
note: Add render test for flex direction. Testing improvement - straightforward.

title: Same Figma node names do not execute smart animations.
note: Smart animations dont execute when Figma nodes share the same name. Name-based matching issue in animation system.

title: Scope Figma Draw features
note: Scope Figma Draw features. Vague investigation task - needs clarification on which draw features to support.
more_details: Need list of specific Figma Draw features to scope

title: investigate security report on DC repo
note: Investigate security report on DC repo. Internal security matter - limited public info.
more_details: Need access to the security report details

title: font family variables support
note: Support font family as Figma variable. Currently font families can only be static, not variable-driven.

title: Allow progress bar and indicator preview simultaneously
note: Allow progress bar and indicator preview simultaneously in Figma plugin. Plugin enhancement.

note: Add rounded corner support in Scalable UI plugin. Plugin feature gap.

note: Add inset support in Scalable UI plugin. Plugin feature gap.

note: Investigate improvements for testing nodes. Vague exploration task.

note: Customizations not propagated to replacement component children. Customization inheritance issue.

note: Support #indicator as child of #progress for progress bars. SystemUI feature - specific naming convention.

note: Implement ripple/touch feedback effect. SystemUI feature - standard Android touch feedback.

note: RTL (Right-to-Left) layout support. SystemUI feature - layout mirroring for RTL locales.

note: More tests for components with override styles. Testing improvement.

note: Figma Collections, Modes, Variables not queryable from DC. API gap in variable system.

title: Support API 35
note: Support API 35 (Android 15). Compatibility update needed.

title: AndroidView in a component replacement can crash if recreated
note: AndroidView in component replacement crashes if recreated. Lifecycle issue with native views in Squoosh.

title: Determine the plan for managing Rust dependencies
note: Plan for managing Rust dependencies. Dependency governance - cargo audit, version pinning strategy.

title: More support for text stroke
note: More text stroke support. Currently limited stroke rendering on text elements.

title: Stroke gradients do not take into account stroke thickness
note: Stroke gradients ignore stroke thickness in rendering calculation. Gradient offset bug.

title: Improve error handling: propagate an error from Rust and show it in DesignSwitcher
note: Propagate Rust errors to Kotlin and show in DesignSwitcher. Error handling improvement.

title: Avoid double key events in animations
note: Avoid double key events in animations. Duplicate input processing during animated transitions.

title: Begin tightly vetting Rust dependencies
note: Begin tightly vetting Rust dependencies. Security/supply chain task.

title: Animate between design token values
note: Animate between design token values. Smooth transitions when token/variable values change.

title: This would be a candidate for writing an `Into` implementation in figma_schema
note: Implement Into trait for figma_schema types. Rust code improvement - type conversion boilerplate.

note: Separate toolkit_schema from figma_schema. Code architecture refactor in Rust crates.

note: More flexibility possible? Vague question about DC flexibility.

note: RHD (Right-Hand Drive) RTL support for automotive. Specialized layout mirroring for driving side.

note: DesignVariant not working with Figma component instances (only works with main components). Instance variant resolution bug.

note: Longpress callback support requested. Missing interaction type in DC event handling.

note: Drag-and-drop implementation requested. Complex interaction feature.

note: Control Figma prototype state programmatically. API to drive prototype interactions from code.

note: Localization plugin UI polish. Figma plugin UI improvements for i18n workflow.

note: Handle rotated component replacement nodes in Squoosh renderer. Rotation transform not applied to replacements.

note: Fill with image not showing on emulator. Image fill rendering failure - customer reported.

title: Scaling two separates instances of a component will always take the original size
note: Scaling two instances of same component always uses original size. Scale factor not per-instance.

note: Support duplicate variable names across multiple Figma documents. Namespace collision in multi-doc scenarios.

note: How to scale Figma objects based on screen DPI. Customer question about density-independent rendering.

note: Reference apps incompatible with latest androidx-lifecycle update. Dependency version conflict.

note: Additional test cases for external renderer comparison. Testing improvement.

note: ImageContext returns incorrect data when node constraints set to "scale". Data loss in constraint mode.

note: Rename "the JSON file" to "Customization Interface" throughout docs. Simple find-and-replace.

note: Roborazzi screenshots differ between Mac and Linux. Platform-dependent rendering in tests.

note: Vectors in serialized documents dont expose all colors. Color data lost during Figma serialization.

note: Document how to keep animation timing constants in sync between Figma and code.

note: Enable DesignModule usage across Gradle projects. Module boundaries prevent cross-project usage.

note: Consolidate JNI library artifacts into single Gradle module. Build architecture simplification.

note: Integrate Roborazzi 1.11 config upgrades. Testing tool version bump.

note: Variant prototype not working for library-imported elements. Cross-file component interaction broken. Warning: "Unable to dispatch CHANGE_TO".
